hero.headline: Aquatic Management Built on 40 Years of Trust
hero.subheadline: Your facility deserves a team that has scaled aquatic operations across five states and 70+ locations. We bring that expertise to your community so you can focus on what matters most — safe, thriving aquatic programs.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Aquatic Solutions That Keep<br class="hidden md:block"> Communities Safe & Thriving
services.subtitle: From lifeguard staffing to full facility management, we handle every aspect of aquatic operations so your community can enjoy safe, well-run programs year-round.

cards.title: Aquatic Facility Management
cards.description: End-to-end management of your aquatic facility — daily operations, maintenance oversight, compliance, and staff coordination tailored to your unique needs.

cards.title: Certified Lifeguard Staffing
cards.description: Professional, certified lifeguards deployed to your facility on your schedule. Reliable, trained personnel who keep swimmers safe every single day.

cards.title: Lifeguard Training & Certification
cards.description: Industry-leading training programs that produce confident, capable lifeguards. Certification courses, water safety instruction, and ongoing professional development.

cards.title: Water Safety Programs
cards.description: Swim lessons, water safety education, and community outreach programs designed to reduce drowning incidents and build water confidence for all ages.

cards.title: Aquatic Consulting
cards.description: Expert consulting to optimize your operations, improve safety protocols, and enhance the overall aquatic experience for your community members.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Operations
cards.description: Full seasonal management including opening, staffing, daily operations, and closing. We handle it all so your HOA or municipality stays worry-free.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Aquatic Operations

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your facility and goals. We will conduct a thorough assessment and deliver a customized management plan within 48 hours — no obligation, no pressure.

steps.title: We Deploy Our Team
steps.description: Our certified, background-checked aquatic professionals arrive ready to manage your facility. Lifeguards, instructors, and managers — all trained to our exacting standards.

steps.title: Your Community Thrives
steps.description: Your facility runs safely, your staff is well-trained, and your community enjoys aquatic programs that make a real difference. We handle the operations — you see the results.

about.label: Why Communities Trust Us
about.headline: Not Just a Vendor — Your Aquatic Operations Partner
about.description: Founded by a team with over 40 years of combined aquatics experience, Poolside Aquatics was built on a simple mission: create safe, inclusive environments where people of all abilities can learn and grow. Our leadership previously scaled an aquatic management company to five states, 70+ locations, and over 600 employees. We bring that depth of experience to every facility we serve — guided by our core values of Excellence, Servant Leadership, and Service First.

features.title: Certified & Vetted Professionals
features.description: Every team member holds current certifications and passes thorough background checks before being placed at your facility.

features.title: Scalable Nationwide Service
features.description: From a single community pool to a multi-state operation, we have the infrastructure and experience to scale with your needs.

features.title: Safety-First Guarantee
features.description: If our service ever falls short of your expectations, we will make it right immediately. Your community's safety is non-negotiable.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Every facility is unique. Contact us for a custom management quote tailored to your specific needs — no contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Safety-First" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any aspect of our aquatic management, we will deploy additional resources and correct the issue at no extra cost. Your community's safety and satisfaction are our top priorities — we stand behind every lifeguard, every training session, and every day of operations we deliver.

faqs.question: How quickly can you staff our facility?
faqs.answer: For most facilities, we can deploy certified lifeguards and management staff within 2-4 weeks. For urgent needs, we maintain a rapid-response roster and can often place qualified personnel within days. We will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you only serve Texas facilities?
faqs.answer: While our roots are in Texas — serving Dallas, Austin, San Antonio, and surrounding communities — our leadership has managed aquatic operations across five states. We are actively expanding nationwide and welcome conversations about facilities anywhere in the country.

faqs.question: What certifications do your lifeguards hold?
faqs.answer: All lifeguards hold current certifications including CPR/AED, First Aid, and lifeguard credentials from nationally recognized programs. Many also hold Water Safety Instructor and Certified Pool Operator certifications. We invest heavily in ongoing training.

faqs.question: Can you manage our existing staff or only provide your own?
faqs.answer: Both. We can provide full staffing solutions, manage and train your existing team, or create a hybrid approach. Our consulting services also offer standalone training programs to elevate your current staff.

faqs.question: What types of facilities do you manage?
faqs.answer: We manage HOA community pools, municipal aquatic centers, private swim clubs, resort and hotel pools, fitness center pools, and waterparks. Each facility gets a customized management plan designed for its specific needs and community.

testimonials.name: Copper Canyon Community
testimonials.text: The Poolside Aquatics crew was exceptional in helping us navigate operations for our brand-new, high-traffic facility. Their professionalism and expertise made all the difference during our first season.

testimonials.name: Riverstone at Westpointe
testimonials.text: If you are looking for lifeguards, you can't go wrong with Poolside. Their team is reliable, well-trained, and genuinely cares about the safety of our residents. We could not be happier.

testimonials.name: Josette K., CMCA
testimonials.text: They do an excellent job hiring the right people, training, providing consistent supervision, and communicating throughout the season. A true partner for any community association.
